output.formatted:
Michelle Wu

SPARQL query over wikidata:
```sparql
PREFIX rdfs: <http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#>
SELECT ?person ?label WHERE {
  ?person rdfs:label "Michelle Wu" @en ; rdfs:label ?label ;
  FILTER(LANG(?label) = 'en')
  .
}
LIMIT 1
```

| ------------- | --------------------- |
| wd:Q109381440 | Michelle Wu (lang:en) |
